story_structure.title: Hustlin: Newport Edition
story_structure.subtitle: A Mobile GTA-Style Adventure in Small-Town Arkansas
story_structure.theme: From barber's chair to city hall — hustle your way up through five bosses and reclaim Newport
story_structure.setting: Newport, Arkansas — 8 explorable districts, each controlled by a boss or faction
story_structure.tone: Character-driven drama with humor, heart, and escalating stakes across 4 acts

act_1.title: The Come Up
act_1.description: Ace returns to Newport, reconnects with Mentor, earns Barbers Row respect, and enters Marcus DeVille's orbit. Ends with the Block Party that puts Ace on the map.

act_2.title: The Grind
act_2.description: Ace is drawn into conflicts with all four mid-level bosses. Marcus's empire crumbles with the crypto collapse. Lexi, Rico, and Fable each challenge Ace. The Leak reveals the Mayor's hand behind everything.

act_3.title: The War
act_3.description: Ace confronts each boss in their territory. Boss fights at DeVille Flagship, LexxCon, Rico's Compound, and the Enlightenment Center. The Mayor emerges as the true puppet master.

act_4.title: The Reckoning
act_4.description: Ace rallies defeated bosses and the community against the Mayor. Gather evidence, storm City Hall, and face the final boss fight on Election Day. Three possible endings.

main_arc.title: The Prodigal Hustler
main_arc.description: Ace returns to Newport and rises from barber to community leader by dismantling five power structures

progression.character_development: Ace reconnects with Mentor, earns the Row's trust, and joins Marcus's operation
Ace discovers each boss's weakness and the Mayor's hidden control over Newport
Ace defeats or allies with each boss, revealing the Mayor as the true antagonist
Ace unites Newport against the Mayor and determines the town's future

progression.description: Marcus recruits Ace. Charismatic mentor figure with flashy ambitions.
Crypto collapse and leak expose Marcus's fragile empire.
Confrontation at DeVille Flagship. Belt-buckle combat, Cadillac chase.
Defeated Marcus can be rallied against the Mayor if player showed mercy.
Lexi films the player without consent, begins content rivalry.
Viral Warfare and Bot Swarm missions reveal her digital empire.
LexxCon showdown. Drones, crowds, T-shirt cannons.
Defeated Lexi can use her platform to expose the Mayor.
Rico's tow trucks harass DeVille district. Border friction.
Tow-Truck Takedown and Industrial Sabotage missions.
Repo Rampage at the impound compound. Monster truck, convoy, Deborah.
Defeated Rico provides his fleet for the City Hall convoy.
Wellness flyers and recruitment seen around town.
Wellness Gone Wrong and Supplement Sabotage missions.
Enlightenment Raid. Acolyte swarms, incense traps, helicopter escape.
Defeated Fable provides chemical knowledge for evidence gathering.
Referenced but unseen. Controls Newport from behind the scenes.
The Leak exposes the Mayor's connections to all four bosses.
Player does the Mayor's dirty work OR gathers evidence against him.
City Hall Siege and Election Day. Secret passages, security detail, gavel combat, balcony speech.
Teaches Ace the barbering craft and Newport's rules
Provides wisdom during boss conflicts
Mentor's shop threatened by faction warfare
Watches Ace take leadership of Newport
Marcus assigns Trix as Ace's handler
Trix grows resentful of Marcus's ego
Trix can be recruited away from Marcus
Trix becomes Ace's most trusted lieutenant
Mentioned in newspaper articles
Investigating corruption, crosses paths with Ace
Announces run against the Mayor
Works with Ace to expose the Mayor's machine

boss_defeat_choices.description: After each boss fight, player chooses mercy or destruction — affecting Act 4 alliances

branches.mercy_outcome: Marcus rallies his crew to support Ace in Act 4. DeVille District becomes allied territory.
branches.destroy_outcome: DeVille District falls into chaos. No support from Marcus's faction in Act 4.

branches.mercy_outcome: Lexi uses her platform to broadcast evidence against the Mayor.
branches.destroy_outcome: No media support. Must find physical evidence for Election Day.

branches.mercy_outcome: Rico's tow-truck fleet forms the convoy for the City Hall siege.
branches.destroy_outcome: No vehicle support. Must approach City Hall on foot.

branches.mercy_outcome: Fable's chemistry knowledge helps analyze evidence from the Mayor's vault.
branches.destroy_outcome: No lab support. Must find another way to verify evidence.

ending_paths.description: Three possible endings based on boss alliances and player choices

endings.name: The People's Champion
endings.condition: Showed mercy to 3+ bosses AND helped community throughout
endings.description: Ace wins with full community support. United Newport. Optimistic future.

endings.name: The Lone Wolf
endings.condition: Destroyed most bosses, relied on self
endings.description: Ace wins but Newport is fractured. Power vacuum. Bittersweet victory.

endings.name: The New Machine
endings.condition: Made deals for power, compromised morals
endings.description: Ace replaces the Mayor but becomes what they fought against. Tragic irony.

reputation_path.description: Player's respect score affects dialogue, mission availability, and ending weight

branches.name: Street_Legend
branches.outcomes: Access to all boss alliance options in Act 4

branches.name: Rising_Hustler
branches.outcomes: Limited alliance options, some bosses refuse to help

branches.name: Lone_Operator
branches.condition: Low community respect, high personal power
branches.outcomes: Must fight Act 4 with minimal support

barbers_row.name: Barbers Row
barbers_row.vibe: Blue-collar pride, barbershop culture, community backbone

deville_district.name: DeVille District
deville_district.vibe: Flashy counterfeit luxury, gold everything, cologne and ambition

spa_district.name: Spa District
spa_district.vibe: Artificially zen, incense fog, crystal shops, wellness pyramid

diaz_district.name: Diaz District
diaz_district.vibe: Industrial grit, tow trucks, chain-link fences, motor oil

downtown.name: Downtown
downtown.vibe: Political power, old money, brick and bronze

jacksonport.name: Jacksonport Area
jacksonport.vibe: Residential edges, strip malls, suburban grit

riverfront.name: Riverfront
riverfront.vibe: Half construction, half decay — the Mayor's pet project

residential.name: Residential District
residential.vibe: Quiet streets, front porches, real Newport

inter_faction_dynamics.alliance_structure: All four mid-level bosses unknowingly serve the Mayor through contracts, donations, and deals

conflicts.deville_vs_rico: Border disputes over DeVille District eastern edge
conflicts.fable_vs_algorithm: Lexi threatens to expose Fable's supplements
conflicts.mayor_controls_all: Parking contracts (Rico), zoning protection (Fable), content deals (Lexi), licensing threats (Marcus)

hustle_and_ambition.description: Every character is hustling — legit or not. The game explores what separates ambition from exploitation.
hustle_and_ambition.exploration: Each boss represents a different hustle taken too far
hustle_and_ambition.resolution: True success comes from lifting the community, not just yourself

community_vs_empire.description: Building community roots vs building personal empires
community_vs_empire.exploration: Player must choose between quick power grabs and slow community investment
community_vs_empire.resolution: Act 4 alliances reward community investment over empire building

corruption_and_accountability.description: Power corrupts at every level — from belt buckles to ballot boxes
corruption_and_accountability.exploration: The Mayor's hidden control reveals systemic corruption
corruption_and_accountability.resolution: Player's ending depends on whether they fight corruption or become it

identity_and_home.description: What does it mean to come home and find it changed — and change it yourself?
identity_and_home.exploration: Ace left Newport and returned to find every block claimed by someone else
identity_and_home.resolution: Home is what you fight for, not what you find

side_quests.name: Crown Vic Chase
side_quests.description: Evade police Crown Victorias across multiple districts

side_quests.name: Parking Lot Wars
side_quests.description: Defend vehicles from Rico's tow trucks at random parking lots

side_quests.name: Content Creator Chaos
side_quests.description: Lexi's drones follow and film the player, drawing crowds and police

side_quests.name: Wellness Recruitment Drive
side_quests.description: Fable's acolytes try to recruit the player on the street

side_quests.name: Barbershop Battles
side_quests.description: Competitive haircut minigame for cash and respect

side_quests.name: Miss Pearl's Errands
side_quests.description: Delivery and help missions for Miss Pearl's Diner

real_elements.geography: White River, real street grid, Jackson County, AR geography
real_elements.culture: Arkansas small-town values, barbershop culture, river town identity
real_elements.economy: Mix of traditional services, small business, and modern ventures
real_elements.history: References to real Newport history and Arkansas heritage

fictional_elements.businesses: Specific businesses are fictional but representative of real types
fictional_elements.events: Dramatic events are fictional but grounded in realistic scenarios
fictional_elements.scale: Compressed geography and accelerated timeline for gameplay

meaningful_choices: Which bosses to show mercy vs. destroy
Whether to ally with Marcus or break away early
How to handle the Mayor's political fixer mission
Which faction allies to recruit for the City Hall siege
Whether to pursue transparency or personal power

consequence_system.immediate: Dialogue changes, NPC reactions, district access
consequence_system.medium_term: Boss alliance availability, mission difficulty, faction hostility
consequence_system.long_term: Three distinct endings based on cumulative choices

boss_fight_outcomes.description: Each boss fight has mercy and destroy paths that directly affect Act 4
